title: Denise Ream
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
[[File:Denise_Ream.jpg|thumb|VFX producer Denise Ream]]
'''Denise Ream''' was the Visual Effects Executive Producer for [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].

She appeared in ''Revenge of the Sith'' as a cameo, portraying [[Onara Kuat]] in [[Romeo Treblanc's private viewing box]] at the [[Galaxies Opera House/Legends|Galaxies Opera House]]. [[Aidan Hennessy]] wrote her backstory through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
